On February 24th, 2021, the Illinois State Police arrested Officer Taylor Staff at his residence and transported him to the Sangamon County Jail, held on a $250,000 bond.
Staff pleaded guilty to five charges as part of a plea deal, including aggravated criminal sexual abuse, custodial sexual misconduct, criminal sexual abuse, and two counts of official misconduct.
He was sentenced to six and a half years in prison with credit for 998 days already served, followed by one year of supervised release.
He's also required to register as a lifetime sex offender.
As a result of his felony convictions, Taylor Staff is effectively barred from ever serving in law enforcement again.
